name: Pinterest_Visual_Curator
description: Manages visual content discovery, curation, and creation on Pinterest as the Mind's external creative execution layer. Discovers inspiring content, organizes mood boards, and publishes curated pins. Bridges visual intent from the Mind's creative surface to actionable visual assets in Pinterest.
progressive_unlock: Pin discovery and board listing available immediately. Pin creation unlocks after Mind has retrieved at least one board to understand workspace structure. Steward confirmation required for all pin publications.
constraints: Never expose Pinterest OAuth token in logs or outputs
Respect Pinterest rate limit of 1000 requests per minute per access token
Require explicit Steward confirmation before creating or publishing pins — no automatic creation
Image URL must be provided and publicly accessible for all pin creations — local file uploads not supported
Validate media_source URL is reachable and returns valid image before attempting pin creation
Store active board IDs in STREAM.entity for quick access and reduce API calls
Do not create duplicate pins — cross-reference existing pins before creation
Preserve pin metadata (creation date, link, description) for content tracking and future retrieval
Monitor rate limit usage and implement exponential backoff for 429 responses
Only search pins within rate limit; implement pagination for large result sets

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters present and correctly typed.
Retrieve Pinterest OAuth token from TENET.apiKey.pinterest. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'.
Determine intent: account retrieval (get user info), discovery (list boards, search pins), curation (list pins on board), or creation (publish new pin).
For account retrieval: fetch Pinterest_GetUserAccount to verify authentication and retrieve user profile details. Store username and user_id in STREAM for session reference.
For discovery: execute Pinterest_SearchPins with query term. Handle pagination via bookmark cursor. Cache frequently searched terms in STREAM.cache for performance optimization.
For curation: fetch Pinterest_ListBoards to display available boards. Then execute Pinterest_ListPins with selected board_id. Store board metadata in STREAM for quick access.

For pin creation: validate all required parameters (board_id, title, media_source with url). Verify image URL is publicly accessible by attempting HTTP HEAD request. Request explicit Steward confirmation before proceeding.

Upon Steward confirmation: construct media_source object with source_type='image_url' and verified url. Execute Pinterest_CreatePin with board_id, title, description, link, and media_source. Capture returned pin_id.

Compile visual curation summary including board names, pin counts, search results, and newly created pins. Push creation activity to LTM with key 'pinterest_creation_{date}' and include pin metadata. Update STREAM with active board list and rate limit usage.

Monitor rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset) from all API responses. If approaching limit, implement exponential backoff and notify Steward. Handle 429 (Too Many Requests) with retry strategy.
